Metadata.title: Minimal finance systems
Metadata.description: Nine2Fire helps build a calm financial system with clear rules, durable rhythms, and room to compound.

Hero.title: Build a financial system that runs without noise.
Hero.description: A calm operating layer for capital, decisions, and editorial signal. Clear structure first. Complexity later, only if it earns its place.

signal.label: Focus
signal.value: Keep the plan visible when the market gets loud.

capital.label: Capital
capital.value: Give every reserve, risk, and move a defined role.

decisions.label: Decisions
decisions.value: Turn repeated judgment into a repeatable system.

ValueProps.title: A foundation made for long cycles, not quick spikes.
ValueProps.description: The first version should stay lean, readable, and ready for expansion into editorial, tools, automation, and AI-assisted flows.

system.title: One operating language
system.description: Pages, tools, and future products can share the same spacing, token, and content structure from day one.

clarity.title: Every section has a job
clarity.description: Navigation stays minimal, copy stays direct, and layout decisions stay easy to extend without rewriting the foundation.

rhythm.title: Responsive by default
rhythm.description: The system is designed mobile-first and keeps its alignment on tablet and desktop without turning into a template.

Roadmap.title: A clear sequence beats a crowded dashboard.
Roadmap.description: The product can grow in measured layers. Each phase adds structure without diluting the brand or the interface.

audit.title: Map the essentials
audit.description: Define the core pages, token system, copy blocks, and message structure before adding moving parts.

design.title: Set the design language
design.description: Lock typography, color behavior, spacing rules, and component patterns so future sections inherit the same standard.

automation.title: Add useful tools
automation.description: Introduce calculators, newsletter flows, and AI-assisted features only when the content and navigation framework are stable.

review.title: Refine the system
review.description: Tighten the details, simplify what drifts, and keep the brand clear as the platform expands.

Insights.title: Insight slots ready for real publishing.
Insights.description: The cards stay simple on purpose. They can later connect to a CMS, editorial workflow, or AI-assisted research flow without changing the page language.

journal.title: What changes when your cash flow has rules.
journal.description: A short editorial format for practical observations, not market theater.

playbook.title: A weekly review that keeps decisions small.
playbook.description: A reusable structure for turning review habits into repeatable outcomes.

signal.title: Less data. Better filters.
signal.description: A compact format for ideas worth keeping visible between research sessions.

CTA.title: Receive the next note when a useful idea is ready.
CTA.description: No feed logic. No content flood. Just the next clear update.

Footer.tagline: A bilingual foundation for editorial finance, tools, and deliberate growth.
